name: electron-forge
description: All-in-one tool for packaging and publishing Electron applications — official scaffolding from Electron team.

seo.title: electron-forge — CI/CD for Applications
seo.meta_description: electron-forge: All-in-one tool for packaging and publishing Electron applications — official scaffolding from Electron team.

when_to_use: Official Electron scaffolding and packaging pipeline
Auto-code-sign and notarize macOS apps in CI
Publish to GitHub Releases with built-in publishers
Vite/Webpack integration for modern frontend bundling

pros: Sane defaults and scaffolding for new apps
Plugin system covers packaging and publishing
Better docs and DX than electron-builder
cons: Less flexibility than electron-builder for edge cases
Some advanced signing workflows still rough
Switching off later can be painful
review.verdict: The recommended starting point for new Electron apps — pick this unless you have a hard reason not to.
review.best_for: New Electron projects wanting official tooling with sensible defaults.
review.not_for: Highly customized installer flows that exceed Forge's plugin surface.
